name: Daily Todo Briefing
description: Daily briefing agent -- reads work emails, calendar, classifies meetings, enriches prospects with LinkedIn and HeyReach conversations
author: datagen

datagen_tools.name: search_linkedin_person
datagen_tools.description: Search LinkedIn by name to find prospect profiles (fallback when HeyReach has no match)

datagen_mcps.name: Gmail
datagen_mcps.description: Fetch unread emails for the daily briefing

datagen_mcps.name: Google Calendar
datagen_mcps.description: Fetch today's calendar events for meeting classification

datagen_mcps.name: HeyReach
datagen_mcps.description: Search outreach conversations to enrich prospect context before meetings

env_vars.name: DATAGEN_API_KEY
env_vars.description: DataGen platform API key for LinkedIn search
